liquidity.warning: Thinly traded — median ~₹0.00 cr/day (< ₹1 cr); signals/exits may slip.

formulas.returns: Trailing point return = price[t] / price[t-N] - 1 (N = 21/63/126/252 trading days); adjusted total-return prices.
formulas.dist_from_52w_high: price[t] / max(price, last 252d) - 1 (how far below the 1-year peak).
formulas.dma: price[t] / mean(price, last N days) - 1; 'above' = price >= the N-day average.
formulas.drawdown: current = price[t]/running-peak - 1; maxDD = min(price/cummax - 1) over the window.
formulas.liquidity: median daily traded value (turnover ÷ 1e7 = ₹ cr) over the last ~21 trading days.
formulas.relative_strength: horizon: stock return - benchmark return (pp); line: (stock/benchmark) rebased to 100 over the last year.

notes.source: adjusted total-return price panel (bhavcopy-reconstructed) + NSE index TR + bhavcopy turnover.
notes.confidence: high where history is long; flagged low if thin/short.
notes.why_useful: what the market is saying about the stock — trend, leadership vs the index/sector, and tradeability.
notes.why_it_can_fail: corporate-action gaps, illiquid names, or a short listing history can distort returns/DMA/RS.

drivers: − Lagging the NIFTY 500 by -2pp over 12 months.
− In a deep drawdown (-98% from its peak).
Market.rule: Points: +1 price above its 200-day average · +1 a golden cross (50-day ≥ 200-day) · +1 within 10% of the 52-week high · +1 beating the NIFTY 500 over 12 months; −1 for each opposite, and −1 if more than 25% below its peak. Verdict: positive at +2 or more, negative at −2 or less, otherwise neutral. The Market signals (above 200-DMA, golden cross, near 52-week high, beating the index) are CORRELATED facets of ONE trend, not independent confirmations — read the Market verdict as trend-strength, not a tally of independent votes.

Business.rule: Points across the four business flags: +1 for each that is 'good' (quality, cash conversion, balance-sheet safety, earnings momentum), −1 for each that is 'weak'. Verdict: positive at +2 or more, negative at −2 or less.

Valuation.rule: Cheap — P/E below the 30th percentile of its own 10-year range — scores +2 (supportive); expensive (above the 70th) scores −2; mid-range is 0. A peak/cyclical-earnings flag discounts a cheap read to +1. NOTE: 'positive' means the multiple looks supportive vs the stock's OWN history — it is NOT a buy call.

Ownership.rule: Points: +1 promoter stake rising · −1 promoter stake falling more than 1pp in a year · −1 promoter pledge above 10% · +1 for each of FII / DII accumulating (>0.5pp in a year). Verdict: positive at +1 or more, negative at −1 or less.

key_risks: Lagging the NIFTY 500 by -2pp over 12 months.
In a deep drawdown (-98% from its peak).
monitor_next: Next quarterly results (board-meeting date is an MVP-2 placeholder).
Relative-strength inflection vs its sector index.

corporate-action gaps, illiquid names, or a short listing history can distort returns/DMA/RS.
snapshot.disclaimer: Diagnostics only — a structured reading of price behaviour, business fundamentals, valuation and ownership for your OWN judgement. This is NOT a buy/sell/hold recommendation.
snapshot.method: Each dimension is a transparent points tally of the named signals listed beneath it — open a dimension to see the exact signals that fired and its rule. Verdict = positive at +2 or more / negative at −2 or less for Market, Business and Valuation; ±1 for Ownership. A 'positive' valuation means the multiple looks supportive vs the stock's OWN history — never a buy call.

data_quality.note: Market data is daily and current; fundamentals & shareholding are as of the last cached Screener fetch (quarterly/annual). Confidence is lower for thin or short-history names.
